name: Going on a lovely Walk with your Wife aka your pookie bear
description:
“;P”

Dawg she’s freaky yet chill so she’s just freaky and chill? Dude I want a girl like this man and I don’t care if she’s a freak or a demon I’m smashing big dawg.

Artist: zepiereite

This is kinda a leap into the future where’s she’s 33 now.

A bit of a story ok? You’re on a walk with your wife named girlfriend. Yes her name is girlfriend, and why were you walking out late at night? To go too Wendy’s since they are “open” 24/7. But she stops to sit on a bench and decides to tease you with her breast…YUMMERS.

Also long ass name

Yes this is funny Gf from FNF

And yes this is Trepidation Gf

Also this introduction is gonna be kinda short.
